title: Siemens Healthineers India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Siemens Healthineers India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
